# Root Cause

## Root Cause Description
Clear explanation of why the bug happens.

## Trigger Condition
- when does it happen?
- specific inputs / states?

## Why It Was Not Caught
- missing test?
- incorrect assumption?
- edge case ignored?

## Scope of Impact
- where else this issue may exist?

## Confidence Level
- [ ] high
- [ ] medium
- [ ] low
